slides.title: Imibono NgoBuhlanga eMaphelweni weKhulu leMinyaka le-19 nele-20
slides.lead: Indlela ama-Yuropho abumba ngayo isayensi yamanga 'yobuhlanga', nendlela imibono leyo eyaphenduka ngayo imithetho, imibuso emikhulu, kwathi ekugcineni, kwaba kubulawa kwesizwe soke.

media.alt: Ikhalipha lokulinganisa elisehla phezu kobuso bomuntu, elifanekisela isayensi yamanga yokulinganisa ubuhlanga.

slides.notes: Vula ngokuveza ngokusobala umbono oyihloko wesihloko soke: 'ubuhlanga' abusilo iqiniso lebhayoloji kodwana lingumbono wehlangano newepolotiki owabunjwa babantu, ikhulu labo ukwenzela ukubuyisela amandla nokungalingani. Bonisa umkhondo omkhulu wesifundo - ukuhlukanisa ngeenqhema, kulandele isayensi yamanga (i-Social Darwinism, i-eugenics), kube khona ipolisi nedluzo (ukubulawa kwesizwe eminyakeni yekoloni, iJarimani lamaNazi, nokuhlobana neSewula Afrika). Beka umbuzo wokuhlaziya wezinga le-FET: imibono iphenduka njani imiphumela?

slides.title: Sitjho ukuthini nge 'buhlanga'?
slides.lead: Isayensi yanamhlanjesi iyavuma bona akukho sisekelo sebhayoloji sokuhlukanisa isintu ngeenhlanga ezihlukileko.

blocks.text: **Ubuhlanga** yindlela yokuhlanganisa abantu ngeempawu zomzimba njengombala wesikhumba. Kubonakala kungokwemvelo, kodwana kuyi**mbono ebunjwe yihlangano** - umbono owabunjwa yihlangano yabantu, ingasi iqiniso elifunyanwa ebhayoloji. Abantu babelana ngaphezu kwe-99.9% ye-DNA yabo, begodu kunomehluko wezakhi zofuzo omkhulu *ngaphakathi* kwaneliphi na iqhema lobuhlanga kunalowo *phakathi* kwamaqhema.

items: **Ubuhlangahlobo** likholelo lokobana amaqhema la angahlelwa ngezinga, amanye 'aphakeme' kunamanye.
Ngeminyaka yee-1800, ama-Yuropho aveza ikholelo leli ngelimi lesayensi.
Ubuhlangahlobo obu 'besayensi' ngemva kwalokho basetjenziswa ukubuyisela ubugqila, umbuso wekoloni, kwathi ngokukhamba kwesikhathi, ukubulawa kwabantu ngobunengi.

slides.notes: Hlukanisa ngokusobala amagama amathathu okungakafuneki bona abafundi bawadidanise: ubuhlanga (isigaba), ubuhlangahlobo (indlela yokukholelwa yokuhlela ngezinga), nobuhlangahlobo besayensi/besayensi yamanga (umzamo wokufakazela ukuhlela loku ngesayensi). Gcizelela bona ukubiza ubuhlanga 'njengombono obunjwe yihlangano' akutjho bona ubuhlangahlobo bumumbulu - imiphumela yabo iyingozi ngokwamambala. Beka isizathu sokuthi isayensi le beyikarisa amaqhema anamandla: yenza ukungalingani kubonakale kungokwemvelo endaweni yokukhetha.

slides.title: Ukuhlukanisa isintu ngeenqhema
slides.lead: Abososayensi bemvelo bama-Yuropho bathoma ukuhlela abantu ngeenhlobo ezingaguqukiko - bebabahlele ngezinga buthule.

blocks.text: Ngesikhathi se-Enlightenment, abososayensi bazama ukuhlukanisa zoke izinto eziphilako. **Carl Linnaeus** (1735) no **Johann Blumenbach** (1795) bahlukanisa abantu ngeenhlobo ezimbalwa 'zezinhlobonhlobo' ngokusekelwe embaleni wesikhumba nesimo sekhanda. U-Blumenbach wasungula ibizo elithi *Caucasian* begodu, okuqakathekileko, wabeka ama-Yuropho phezulu ehlelweni lakhe.

items: Ukuhlukanisa kwabonakala kungakhethi, kodwana kwakha **ihierarkhi** enama-Yuropho njengeqophelo eliphakemeko.
Iingaba lezi zabunjwa sikhathi sobugqila neyokwanda kwemibuso yekoloni.
Abacabangi bakamva bathatha iinhlobo lezi ezasungulwako ngasuthi zingaguqukiko begodu zingokwemvelo.

media.alt: Amabhoksi amane anelabula ahlelwe njengephiramidi enezinga, afanekisela iingaba zobuhlanga ezasungulwako.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='84' y='24' width='52' height='26' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='64' y='58' width='92' height='26' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='44' y='92' width='132' height='26' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' y='126' width='172' height='26' fill='#b7a98d'/><line x1='110' y1='18' x2='110' y2='152' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Veza ikhambo elifihliweko: ukuhlukanisa (ukuhlela) kwarhelela kwaya ehierarkhini (ukuhlela ngezinga) ngaphandle kobufakazi bokuhlela ngezinga. U-Blumenbach ngokwakhe bekanganeli ihierarkhi kunalabo abamsebenzisako, kodwana abalandeli bakhe baqinisa iingaba zakhe - lo mtlhala omuhle wokuthi isayensi ingagotjwa njani ukukhonza itjhukumiso. [SME] Qinisekisa amalanga/ababelane ncani (Linnaeus 1735 Systema Naturae; Blumenbach 1795 edition) maqondana nesihloko se-SAHO ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.title: Ubuhlangahlobo besayensi
slides.lead: Ukulinganisa amakhanda nemizimba ukuze 'kufakazelwe' ihlelo lezinga elabe seliqunjiwe ngaphambili.

blocks.text: Ngeminyaka yee-1800, abanobuhlangahlobo basebenzisa amathulusi njenge **craniometry** (ukulinganisa ubukhulu bekhanda) ne **phrenology** (ukufunda amaqhuqhwa ekhanda) ukuze bathi amanye amaqhema abukhali kunamanye. Sikubiza bona **buhlangahlobo besayensi yamanga** ngombana busebenzisa *ukubonakala* kwesayensi kanti buziba indlela efaneleko - abarhubhululi bafuna ubufakazi obuvumelanako nalokho abasele bakukholelwa.

items: Idatha yakhethwa, yafundwa budungu namkha yasungulwa ukusekela ukuphakama kwama-Yuropho.
Isiphetho (ihierarkhi yobuhlanga) sathathwa njengeqiniso ngaphambi kobana 'irhubhululo' lithome.
Kwanikela ubugqila, ukunqoba kwekoloni nokuhlukaniswa ngobuhlanga isizathu 'sesayensi' esihloniphekako.

media.alt: Ikhanda leentlitli eduze nesethi yamathulusi wokulinganisa nerula.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M60 46 q40 -20 66 8 q20 22 6 50 q-6 12 -22 12 h-8 v14 h-14 v-14 h-10 q-20 0 -26 -22 q-8 -30 8 -48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><circle cx='84' cy='78' r='8' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='110' cy='80' r='7' fill='#5c1414'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='188' y1='30' x2='150' y2='120' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='168' y1='30' x2='188' y2='30' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gcizelela umraro wendlela, ngombana kuyihloko yomqondo lo: isayensi yamanga iguqula indlela yesayensi ngokuthoma ngesiphetho bese ifuna ubufakazi obusisekelako. I-Craniometry (isibonelo iinqhema zamakhanda zabarhubhululi njengo Samuel Morton) yatjengiswa kamva bona begodu igcwele ukukhetha nemitjhapho. Xhumanisa nekghono le-FET lokuhlola ukuthenjwa kweemthombo - laba bebayi 'zingcweti' zabo isikhundla salihlukumezwa.

slides.title: I-Social Darwinism
slides.lead: Ukuguqula ithiyori engemvelo ibe sizathu sesihluku sabantu.

blocks.text: Incwadi ka Charles Darwin ethi *On the Origin of Species* (1859) yahlathulula indlela iinhlobo eziguquka ngayo ngokukhetha kwemvelo. Abanye - khulukhulu **Herbert Spencer**, owasungula ibinzana elithi *survival of the fittest* (ukuphila kwabanamandla khulu) - basebenzisa lokhu budungu ehlanganweni yabantu. I-**Social Darwinism** yathi izizwe ezinjingileko, imilibo yabantu 'neenhlanga' bezinamandla ngombana bezingcono ngokwemvelo.

items: Yaveza ukungalingani nobudududu njengento yemvelo ngitjho neyifuneka.
Yabuyisela i-imperialism: ukunqoba kwathathwa njengalapha 'abanamandla' bahlula 'ababuthakathaka'.
Ibhayoloji ka-Darwin yaphambaniswa; akhange athi abanye abantu kufuze babuse abanye.

media.alt: Iintebhisi eziphakamako ezineraro, ezitjho iladari yamanga yeqophelo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='116' width='36' height='28' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='66' y='96' width='36' height='48' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='108' y='72' width='36' height='72' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='150' y='44' width='36' height='100' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M30 108 L180 36' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M180 36 L168 40 M180 36 L176 50' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yiba ncani ebafundini be-FET: i-Social Darwinism kusetjenziswa budungu kwa-Darwin, ingasi umbono ka-Darwin ngokwakhe (isirobho esijayelekileko sehlolo). U-Spencer, ingasi Darwin, wasungula ibinzana elithi 'survival of the fittest'. Umsebenzi oyihloko wombono lo bewungowetjhukumiso - wenza ukwakhiwa kwemibuso yama-Yuropho nokungalingani okubuhlungu kwezomnotho kubonakale njengemithetho yemvelo engekhe iphikiswe namkha kufuze iphikiswe.

slides.title: I-Eugenics (isayensi yokuzala 'okungcono')
slides.lead: Nengabe ihlangano ingazala izitjalo nemfuyo engcono, kwaphikiswa abanye, kubayini singazali abantu 'abangcono'?

blocks.text: I-**Eugenics** (isuka esiGirikini sokuthi 'ozelwe kuhle') yathiywa ibizo ngu **Francis Galton**, umzala ka-Darwin, ngo-1883. Beyifuna 'ukuthuthukisa' isibalo sabantu ngokukhuthaza 'abanamandla' bona babe nabantwana (*positive* eugenics) nokuvimbela 'ababuthakathaka' bona bangazali (*negative* eugenics) - ngokuhlukanisa, ukuvimbela imitjhado nokutshwabhulwa ngokukatelelwa.

items: 'Ababuthakathaka' bahlathululwa bafaka abadududu, abakhubazekileko, abagula ngokwengqondo nabantu abangasibo abamhlophe.
Yaguqula ubuhlangahlobo besayensi yamanga baba **yiprojekhthi yesenzo somumo (state)**.
Ngeminyaka yokuthoma yee-1900, i-eugenics beyijayelekile begodu ihloniphekile eYuropho nase-USA.

media.alt: Umuthi womndeni ohlotjisiweko onamagatja aphawuliweko begodu asikiweko, ofanekisela ukukhethwa kokuzala.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='110' y1='140' x2='110' y2='70' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='60' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='84' x2='160' y2='44' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='110' y1='104' x2='150' y2='96' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='60' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='12' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='154' cy='96' r='12' fill='#c8b89a'/><line x1='140' y1='82' x2='168' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='168' y1='82' x2='140' y2='110' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silayidi esiyisiphetu: i-eugenics kulapha imibono eyingozi iba khona amasu wesenzo sombuso emalungana nabantu bamambala. Qaphela bona i-eugenics beyingasi ikholelo elingaphandle - beyifundiswa emayunivesithi aphambili begodu isekelwa ngabososayensi abahloniphekileko, osopolotiki nabaguquli kizo zoke iinhlangothi zepolotiki. Ukuhlonipheka lokho kuyilona ncwana elayenza yaba yingozi khulu. Bonisa ngaphambili bona iimbono ezimbili ezilandelako zitjengisa i-eugenics ibekwa emthethweni.

slides.title: I-Eugenics e-United States
slides.lead: IAmerika beyilizwe lokuthoma ukuguqula i-eugenics ibe yipolisi yombuso enkulu.

blocks.text: Kusukela ngo-1907, imibuso ye-US yakhipha imithetho **yokutshwabhula ngokukatelelwa** abantu abathathwa njenge 'ababuthakathaka'. Ecaleni lango-1927 elithi *Buck v. Bell*, i-Supreme Court yavuma ukutshwabhula, uJustice Oliver Wendell Holmes atlola umutjho odumileko othi, 'Amazizukulwana amathathu weentlhogo aneleko.' Amakhulukhulu wama-Amerika atshwabhulwa ngaphandle kwemvumo, begodu umthetho we-Immigration Act ka-1924 wasebenzisa umcabango we-eugenics ukuvimbela amaqhema 'angafuneki'.

items: Iinhlekelele bezidluleleko zibadududu, abakhubazekileko nabomphakathi omncani.
I-eugenics ye-US yasekelwa ngemali, yahlelwa begodu yathandwa mazweni azombelezileko.
Abososayensi bobuhlanga bamaJarimani bafunda imithetho yama-Amerika ncani njengesibonelo.

media.alt: Isando sikamahluleli sihlezi phezu kwedokhumende enesitembu esibovu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='48' y='70' width='90' height='70' fill='#fff' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='84' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='98' width='66' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='112' width='44' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='116' cy='126' r='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='44' height='18' rx='4' fill='#5c1414' transform='rotate(35 172 49)'/><rect x='150' y='58' width='10' height='40' rx='3' fill='#7a5a3a' transform='rotate(35 155 78)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ilesson lithi indlela eya emahluleleni wamaNazi ayithomanga eJarimani. I-USA, idemokhrasi, yathoma ipolisi ye-eugenics ekatelelako, begodu abenzi bemithetho bamaNazi bacaphula ngokusobala imithetho yama-Amerika lokha nebatlola eyabo. Phatha ncani umutjho we-Buck v. Bell - uwubize njengeqiniso lomlando elilihlazo, ingasi ihlazo ekufuze uphindaphinde ngokungakhathaliko. [SME] Qinisekisa iimbalo zokutshwabhula (ezijayele ukucatjhulwa njengezingaphezu kwe-60,000 ekhulwini le-20) nokuthi umthetho wokuthoma we-1907 Indiana maqondana nomthombo we-SAHO ngaphambi kokukhipha.

slides.title: IKoloni nokubulawa kwesizwe sama-Herero namaNama
slides.lead: E-German South West Africa (namhlanjesi yiNamibia), imibono yobuhlanga yaveza lokho abanengi abakubiza njengokubulawa kwesizwe kokuthoma ekhulwini le-20.

blocks.text: Lokha abantu bama-**Herero** namaNama bavukela umbuso wekoloni yamaJarimani, uNjengele **Lothar von Trotha** wakhipha umyalo wokubhubhisa (1904). Abasindako baqhutjhelwa esirhawini namkha emakampeni wokuvalelwa, lapha iinkulungwana zafela khona. Amakhanda weentlitli wabafileko athunyelwa eJarimani ukuze asetjenziswe erhubhululweni 'lwesayensi yobuhlanga'.

items: Abelandi bomlando balinganisa bona kwabulawa ama-Herero angaba yi-65,000 namaNama angaba yi-10,000.
Ithiyori yobuhlanga yaguqula ukubulawa kwabantu ngobunengi kwaba 'kususwa kwemvelo' kwabantu 'abaphasi'.
Imibono efanako yamakampe nehierarkhi yobuhlanga beyizabuya eYuropho ngemva kweminyaka eminengi.

media.alt: Ihlathi lesirhawi elingatjhisako elinelanga eliphasi, elifanekisela isirhawi seNamib.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='104' width='240' height='56' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 104 q60 -22 120 0 t120 0 v56 H0 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='22' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M0 132 q80 -14 240 4 v24 H0 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silayidi sisekela imibono ecatjangwako esehlekeleleni esibonakalako esinesihlobo esiqondileko nesifunda seSewula Afrika (iNamibia yaphathwa yiSewula Afrika inengi lekhulu le-20). Gcizelela okwesabekako kwamakhanda athunyelwa erhubhululweni lobuhlanga - kutjengisa isayensi yamanga nedluzo lokubulawa kwabantu kondlana. Dweba umudwa oqondileko wokuqhubeka waya eJarimani lamaNazi ngaphandle kokuhlanganisa imicimbi emibili ibe yinye. [SME] Ukubekwa 'kokubulawa kwesizwe kokuthoma ekhulwini le-20' neenbalo zeenhlekelele kusetjenziswa kabanzi kodwana kuyaphikiswa ngobukhulu; qinisekisa maqondana nesihloko se-SAHO se-Herero Revolt.

slides.title: 'Uhlanga oluphakemeko' lwamaNazi
slides.lead: AmaNazi akha umbuso woke ngesayensi yamanga 'yohlanga oluphakemeko lwama-Aryan'.

blocks.text: Ngemva kwango-1933, iJarimani lamaNazi lenza ihierarkhi yobuhlanga isisekelo somthetho. Basungula uhlanga oluphakemeko lwama-**Aryan** (*Herrenvolk*) begodu bahlathulula amaJuda, amaRoma, abantu abaNzima nabanye nj 'zitha' eziphasi. I-**Nuremberg Laws (1935)** yalamula amaJuda ubuzwe begodu yavimbela imitjhado phakathi kwamaJuda namanye amaJarimani - iguqula ubuhlangahlobo besayensi yamanga baba yihlelo lomthetho lokuhlukanisa.

items: Umthetho ka-1933 wavumela ukutshwabhula ngokukatelelwa 'kwabangaphili kuhle ngofuzo', ubalisela i-US eugenics.
Iphrophaganda, iimfundo nesayensi zoke bezifundisa ihierarkhi yobuhlanga njengeqiniso.
Ukuhlukaniswa kwakhula sinyathelo ngesinyathelo: kusukela ebuzweni, kuya empahleni, kuya ekuphileni ngokwakho.

media.alt: Idokhumende esemthethweni enesitembu bese idatjulwa ibe zii-imbili, efanekisela ubuzwe obususwe ngomthetho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='118' y='34' width='54' height='92' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='60' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='60' y='60' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='48' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='128' y='72' width='34' height='5' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M104 30 L112 60 L104 90 L112 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M118 30 L110 60 L118 90 L110 126' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tjengisa abafundi indlela isihloko se-CAPS esifuna bona bayizwisise: imibono yobuhlanga iba 'yingcenye ehlangeneko yepolisi nomthetho wombuso'. I-Nuremberg Laws yisibonelo esisobala khulu - umthetho ohlathulula bona ngubani obalwa njengomuntu ophelele. Veza umudwa oqondileko osuka esilayidini se-US eugenics: umthetho wokutshwabhula wamaJarimani ka-1933 wabunjwa ngengcenye ngokwemithetho yama-Amerika. Gcizelela indlela yokuhlukumeza eyandayo - akhange kuthome ngokubulawa, kwathoma ngamaphepha.

slides.title: I-Holocaust
slides.lead: Itjhukumiso yobuhlanga yaphelela ekubulaweni okuhleliweko, kwefekthri kwezigidi zabantu.

blocks.text: Ngesikhathi sePi yePasi yesiBili umbuso wamaNazi wenza i-**Holocaust** - ukubulawa okuqondile, okuhleliweko kwabantu abangaba **zigidi eziyisithandathu zamaJuda**, kanye namaRoma, abantu abakhubazekileko, iphikisano yezepolotiki nabanye abathathwa njenge 'abangakufaneleki ukuphila'. Lokhu bekuyipheleliso eyesabekako yekhulu leminyaka lomcabango wobuhlanga owabe uhlele abantu wathi wasebenza ngehlelo lelo.

items: Abakhubazekileko babhala hlangana neenhlekelele zokuthoma, ngeprogremu ye 'euthanasia' yangaphambili.
Ibhyurokhrasi, isayensi nethekhnoloji zasetjenziswa ekubulaweni ngezinga lefekthri.
I-Holocaust ijame njengesiyeleliso esidluleleko sokuthi imibono yobuhlanga ingaya kuphi.

media.alt: Ikandlela eyodwa ekhanyako emumeni onzima, luphawu lwesikhumbuzo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#2b2b2b'/><rect x='88' y='72' width='24' height='60' rx='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='8' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M100 22 q14 20 0 36 q-14 -16 0 -36 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M100 34 q7 10 0 20 q-7 -10 0 -20 Z' fill='#fff4d6'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silayidi esizwelako khulu - siphathe ngobunzima nokutjhejisisa. Gcina okugilweko emtlholeni wobuntu nasekukhumbuleni, ingasi eengcenyeni ezimbi khulu. Yenza umbono wokuhlaziya wokuthi i-Holocaust bekungasi kuhlanya kwesikhatjhana kodwana bekumphumela odluleleko wemibono abafundi abayilandeleleko soke isifundo: ukuhlukanisa, ihierarkhi, ukususa ubuntu, ukuhlukaniswa, kube kubhujiswa. Qaphela isiqondiso se-SAHO sokufundisa nge-Holocaust bese uxhumanise namalungelo wabantu aveza ngemva kwalokho (i-Universal Declaration of Human Rights ka-1948 nebizo elithi 'genocide').

slides.title: Imibono yobuhlanga neSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Imigudu efanako yomcabango wobuhlanga yabumba ukuhlukaniswa ne-apartheid ekhaya.

blocks.text: ISewula Afrika beyiyingcenye yendaba le yephasi loke. Imibuso yekoloni neyeenifiki yasebenzisa imibono efanako yesayensi yamanga ukubuyisela ukunqoba, ukususwa kwabantu emhlabathini nokuhlukaniswa. Ngemva kwango-1948, i-**apartheid** yakha ihlelo lomthetho loke ngokuhlukanisa ngobuhlanga - khulukhulu **kuPopulation Registration Act ka-1950**, owahlela woke umuntu 'ebuhlangeni' obusemthethweni.

items: Abelandi bomlando bavame ukumadanisa imithetho ye-apartheid yokuthoma nomthetho wobuhlanga wamaNazi.
Emithethweni yombili, umbuso, ingasi ibhayoloji, owaqunta bona ngubani owelela 'kuluphi uhlanga'.
Ukuzwisisa isayensi yamanga yobuhlanga kusiza ukuhlathulula bona i-apartheid beyingakalungi njani empandeni yayo.

media.alt: Incwadi yobuzwe (ID) enesitembu sesigaba, ebalisela ukuhlukanisa ngobuhlanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='45' y='24' width='90' height='112' rx='4' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='56' y='38' width='34' height='40' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='73' cy='54' r='9' fill='#9aa77f'/><path d='M60 74 q13 -14 26 0 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='96' y='42' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='30' height='5' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='56' y='92' width='68' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='56' y='116' width='52' height='6' fill='#cdd6b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka ukufaneleka kwesihloko ebafundini beSewula Afrika: imibono efundwa lapha bekungasi umraro weYuropho kwaphela, yasetjenziswa ukwakha ukuhlukaniswa ne-apartheid ekhaya. Dweba umadaniso ophathwe ncani neJarimani lamaNazi (bobabili basebenzisa ukuhlukanisa kombuso) uphinde uqaphele umehluko - i-apartheid beyihlose ukuhlukumeza nokuhlukaniswa okulawulwako endaweni yokubhubhisa. Lokhu kuxhumanisa ngaphambili nezingcenye ze-apartheid zeBanga 11 ne-12.

slides.title: Kusukela ekuhlukaniseni kuya ehlekeleleni

blocks.alt: Umuduwomlando wokuthuthuka kwemibono yobuhlanga kusukela ngo-1735 kuya ku-1950.

events.label: U-Darwin ukhipha incwadi ethi On the Origin of Species
I-US Buck v. Bell ivuma ukutshwabhula ngokukatelelwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa umuduwomlando ukuqinisa umbono njengeketanga yombangela nomphumela: umbono (ukuhlukanisa) uqinisa waba yisayensi yamanga (Social Darwinism, eugenics), otlolwa emthethweni (US, iJarimani lamaNazi, iSewula Afrika) begodu wenziwa njengedluzo (ukubulawa kwesizwe kwekoloni, i-Holocaust). Bawa abafundi bahlonze bona yiphi imicimbi 'eyimibono', yiphi 'eyimithetho' neyiphi 'eyidluzo' - kuqinisa isakhiwo esiyihloko sesihloko ngaphambi kwemibuzo yokubuyekeza.

slides.title: Esikufundileko
slides.lead: Imibono inamandla: isayensi yamanga yobuhlanga, nekade seyikholelwe yabekwa emthethweni, yabiza ukuphila kwabantu abazizigidi ezinengi.

blocks.text: Kisifundo lesi silandelele indlela 'ubuhlanga' obabunjwa ngayo, **abungatholwanga**; indlela isayensi yamanga (Social Darwinism ne-eugenics) eyanikela ngayo ubuhlangahlobo isuvubu esihloniphekako; nokuthi, lokha imibuso itlola imibono le **emthethweni**, imiphumela yasukela ekutshwabhuleni ngokukatelelwa kuya ekubulaweni kwesizwe kwekoloni ne-Holocaust. Ukufunda umlando lo yisiyeleliso ngengozi yemibono esusa ubuntu - begodu kuyivikelo yamalungelo wabantu nesithunzi sabantu.

blocks.label: Q1
blocks.question: Hlathulula bona kubayini abelandi bomlando bahlathulula isayensi yobuhlanga yekhulu le-19 njenge 'sesayensi yamanga'. Qalisela endleleni iimphetho ezafinyelelwa ngayo.

blocks.label: Q2
blocks.question: 'Imibono yobuhlanga yaba yingozi ngokwamambala kwaphela lokha imibuso seyiyiguqule yaba mthetho.' Uyavumelana? Sebenzisa okungasenani iimbonelo ezimbili ezisuka esifundweni lesi ukusekela ipendulo yakho.

blocks.label: Q3
blocks.question: Madanisa indlela ubuhlanga obasetjenziswa ngayo eJarimani lamaNazi neSewula Afrika ye-apartheid. Hlonza ubufano obunye nomehluko owodwa.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela embonweni wokuvula - ubuhlanga yimbono ebunjwe yihlangano enemiphumela ekhohlakeleko yamambala - nangokuqinisekisa ipendulo yamalungelo wabantu eyalandela ngemva kwango-1945. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengevivinyo elitloliweko namkha ipisiswano ehleliweko; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela iindlela ze-CAPS zokutlola okwandisiweko nokumadaniswa kweemthombo (Q2 yisiqetjhana esincani/i-essay; Q3 ilolonga ikghono lokumadanisa isihloko esifunako). Khumbuza abafundi bona isihloko lesi sisekela izingcenye ze-apartheid nezamalungelo wabantu ezizako.
